title: adhatoda rostrata
intro: Adhatoda rostrata, also known as Adhatoda vasica, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is commonly found in the tropical regions of India and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Adhatoda rostrata include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including tea, infusions, and capsules, to provide relief from respiratory problems and promote overall health and well-being.
